result.summary: Merge.dev exposes a Unified REST API, an Agent Handler management REST API, an Agent Handler MCP server, and a Merge CLI; the documented HTTP and MCP surfaces require Merge-issued bearer credentials.
result.description: Merge provides a unified integration platform for connecting to many third-party business systems through normalized APIs. It also offers Agent Handler, a tool-calling platform for AI agents that routes actions across connected SaaS tools.

merge_api_key.label: Merge API key
merge_api_key.setup: Sign in to the [Merge dashboard](https://app.merge.dev/login) and create or copy your API key from your Merge application settings. Use it as a bearer token in the `Authorization` header, as shown in Merge's [authentication docs](https://docs.merge.dev/merge-unified/hris/merge-api-basics/authentication).

merge_linked_account_token.label: Merge Linked Account token
merge_linked_account_token.setup: Create a linked account for an end customer using [Merge Link](https://docs.merge.dev/merge-unified/merge-link/overview) or the relevant account-linking flow in your Merge implementation, then use the resulting linked account token in the `X-Account-Token` header, per Merge's [authentication docs](https://docs.merge.dev/merge-unified/hris/merge-api-basics/authentication).

merge_ah_access_key.label: Merge Agent Handler access key ID and secret
merge_ah_access_key.setup: In Agent Handler, open the [Access Keys](https://docs.merge.dev/merge-agent-handler/administer/access-keys) section and create an access key. Keep both the key ID and secret; these are used to authenticate to Agent Handler surfaces such as its MCP endpoint and management API.

merge_ah_application_credential.label: Merge Agent Handler application credential
merge_ah_application_credential.setup: In Agent Handler, go to [Application Credentials](https://docs.merge.dev/merge-agent-handler/administer/application-credentials) and create an application credential for a connector. Use this credential when configuring the connector or related Agent Handler workflows.

packages.runtimeHint: Install method not confirmed from scraped docs
